name: 11ai-jest-operations
description: Modular, standalone skills for common Jest testing operations.

interface.shortDescription: Run common Jest testing tasks safely and clearly.
interface.longDescription: A modular toolbox for inspecting Jest projects, targeting test runs, using watch mode, collecting coverage, managing snapshots and mocks, handling async code and timers, configuring Jest, preparing CI runs, and troubleshooting failures.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the 11ai-jest-operations skills for this Jest task.
